name: AIBOM: emitted SBOM lists each prompt registry entry (id + version) as a component (per P-1 + P-7 ingestion)
command:
mkdir -p compliance prompts && printf "- id: rsc-reviewer
  versions:
    - version: 2.1.0
      file: rsc-reviewer/v2.1.0.md
      status: active
" > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json --include-prompts && grep "rsc-reviewer" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && grep "2.1.0" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
